creator: robn@despairlabs.com
text:
Dug a bit more today. As best I can tell, when you tell Skia to build with its own jpeg-turbo and not the system one, it will use a repo pinned at 2.1.0.

https://skia.googlesource.com/external/github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo/

In that version, the NULL dereference doesn't happen:

https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo/blob/2.1.x/jdmaster.c#L101

So I suppose the answer is that libskiasharp should build with: skia_use_system_libjpeg_turbo=false

However, just changing this in ports/graphics/libskiasharp/Makefile and rebuilding yields:

ninja: error: '../third_party/externals/libjpeg-turbo/jaricom.c', needed by 'obj/third_party/externals/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg.jaricom.o', missing and no known rule to make it

So I guess that bit needs to be pulled separately.
